label: BLJ_label
reason: At the start, the camera rapidly skims along the brick wall with no run-up visible, then Mario pops up from the square recess and is seen sliding backward on the grating at abnormally high speed before continuing. The abrupt appearance, backwards-facing long-jump posture, and sudden high horizontal velocity match the visual cues of repeated backwards long jumps, consistent with the base BLJ example.
